A quiet-weather guide to low-mood patterns

Depression is a mood disorder in this synthetic description of a persistent low-mood pattern.

It affects how you feel, think and behave in the fictional scenario used here.

Symptoms

Feelings of sadness may appear with the fictional example's irritability, sleep changes, and tiredness.

When to see a doctor

If you feel depressed, make an appointment in this example with a doctor or mental health professional.
